description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic gray chassis and a black keyboard. The screen is open and displays a software interface, suggesting active use. The keyboard features a full QWERTY layout with a numeric keypad, and the touchpad is positioned slightly left of center below the keyboard. Several ports are visible along the left and right edges, including USB and HDMI, and there are ventilation grilles for cooling. The laptop's lid is plain with no visible branding, while the palm rest area features a couple of small stickers, likely indicating hardware specifications. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for both work and casual use in urban environments.
description: A slim, metallic gray laptop with a black keyboard, open screen displaying software, and visible ports and stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the keyboard, touchpad, open screen, and multiple ports including USB and HDMI.
description_view_1: Rear view of the closed laptop lid, plain metallic gray with no visible branding or features.
description_view_2: Right side view highlighting the keyboard, touchpad, open screen, and additional ports and ventilation grilles.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full keyboard layout, touchpad, open screen with software interface, and stickers on the palm rest.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a software interface with multiple windows.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and numeric keypad, standard English language keys.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two small stickers are present on the right palm rest area, one blue and one silver, likely indicating hardware specifications.
